name: crew
description: Room-based coordination for AI coding agents via tmux. Agents self-register into rooms, send messages, track tasks, and monitor each other's status.

interface.shortDescription: Room-based AI agent coordination via tmux
interface.longDescription: Provides MCP tools for AI coding agents to coordinate in tmux sessions. Agents join named rooms with roles (boss/leader/worker), exchange messages, assign tasks, and monitor status via tmux pane inspection. Includes skills for each agent role.
defaultPrompt: Use cc-tmux to join a room and coordinate with other agents.
Use cc-tmux to monitor agent status and assign tasks.
